synopsis: Darth Vader at last learns the name of the boy who destroyed the Death Star and sets a plan in motion for revenge. He enlists General Ulric Tagge and his younger sister Domina Tagge, a member of the neutral Order of the Sacred Circle. Each side of the Galactic Civil War is to send a single envoy to the world of Monastery to present its case: Vader represents the Empire, and Domina arranges for the Rebels to send Luke Skywalker. Leia and Han shadow the mission in the *Millennium Falcon*, monitoring Luke through R2-D2. As Luke worries he is out of his depth in the diplomatic role, Domina reassures him, concealing her true aim of avenging the apparent death of Orman Tagge.
title: Star Wars (1977) #35: Dark Lord's Gambit
